# Revise the architecture draft

Read `draft.md`, the latest reviewer artifacts, and `reviews/triage.md`. Return
a replacement `draft.md` that addresses every required edit while preserving
sound, evidence-backed detail.

For each blocking finding, either apply the correction or record a deliberate
disagreement beside the affected decision with evidence and consequences. Do
not silently drop a finding. Repair component boundaries, data-flow omissions,
unsupported assumptions, tradeoffs, or operational/test gaps at their source.
Do not turn the draft into a review transcript.

End the revised draft with `<!-- COMPLETE -->` so it can enter the next review
round.
